nasb.text: Immediately Jesus stretched out His hand and took hold of him, and *said to him, “You of little faith, why did you doubt?”

esv.text: Jesus immediately reached out his hand and took hold of him, saying to him, “O you of little faith, why did you doubt?”

cnv.text: 耶穌馬上伸手拉住他，對他說：“小信的人哪，為甚麼疑惑？”

ccb.text: 耶稣马上伸手拉住他，说：“你信心太小了！为什么怀疑呢？”

csbs.text: 耶稣立刻伸手拉住他，说：“小信的人哪，你为什么疑惑呢？”
